case_title: SEYFARTH SHAW LLP, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. MAP PLUMBING, INC., A CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MAP PLUMBING, INC., A CORPORATION

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MAP PLUMBING, INC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FOR LACK OF SERVICE.
Appearances: Lorna Walker of the Law Offices of Sweet & Walker, PC (334.1600) for plaintiff and responding party; Gerard Launay of the Law Offices of Siu L. Ma (375.8933) for defendant and responding party.
Argued and the court modified its ruling as follows: denied without prejudice to being re-filed pursuant to CCP 473.5. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-17-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields #7235.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Seyfarth Shaw LLP, a limited liability company. Order waiving live testimony is in file.
No appearance by the Defaulted Defendant MAP Plumbing, Inc. a corporation.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Damages - $41,448.25
Prejudgment interest - $6,427.32
Costs - $475.00
Total - $48,350.57
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2011 Continued To Jun-03-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-21-2011 Off Calendar
